scope: TorchTitan shared-KV sparse-MLA compressed-dKV TileLang bridge

code_changes.read: The bridge can now time the fast selected-limit TileLang dKV producer directly instead of hiding it behind tilelang_materialized_dkv or falling back to plan-free group-filter.

s512_correctness.read: Small-shape parity is clean in the expected BF16 compressed-dKV band. The TileLang bridge is slower than PyTorch at S512, so this is not a small-shape optimization.

s4096_bridge_timing.read: At S4096 the selected-limit source bridge is now a real improvement over both the prior plan-free group-filter bridge and the same-shape explicit PyTorch bridge, but it still includes explicit selected-state materialization outside the dKV producer.

s4096_adapter_breakout.read: The real TileLang dKV body is already below the old 8.0-8.8 ms sparse-atomic wall. Source-indexing avoids the 512 MiB packed P and 512 MiB packed dP slabs, but adds about 1.13 ms versus packed kernel-only. Route-plan generation is still not production-ready when built as standalone Torch metadata.

tilelang_next: Reuse or GPU-produce LI selected-limit metadata instead of building it as a standalone Python/Torch plan.
Fuse or adjacent-produce P and scaled dP into the selected-limit dKV producer so selected-KV/probs/grad_logits are no longer materialized.
Keep group_filter only as the plan-free fallback/control; selected_limit_source is the higher-return S4096 bridge branch.
